mapper.sql: id, do_id, do_item, modelno, qty, out_qty, remark, price, green_code, product_name, cproduct_no, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, contract_no
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_do_item
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_do_item (id, do_id, do_item, modelno, qty, out_qty, remark, price, green_code, product_name, cproduct_no, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, contract_no ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.ops_do_item
id,
do_id,
do_item,
modelno,
qty,
out_qty,
remark,
price,
green_code,
product_name,
cproduct_no,
version,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_do_item
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_item = #{record.doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
green_code = #{record.greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cproduct_no = #{record.cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
contract_no = #{record.contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_do_item set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_item = #{record.doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, green_code = #{record.greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cproduct_no = #{record.cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, contract_no = #{record.contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_do_item
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_item = #{doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
out_qty = #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
green_code = #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cproduct_no = #{cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
contract_no = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_do_item set do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_item = #{doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, out_qty = #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, green_code = #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cproduct_no = #{cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, contract_no = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
